repoRoot.description: Repo root recorded in the trust file; null for legacy files written before provenance stamping.

path.description: The user-level trust file backing this state (path disclosure, no content).

allowFullAccess.description: Whether unsandboxed full access is allowed for the repo.

accessDefault.description: Default access profile for runs in the repo.

ControlTrustState.description: Trust state of one repo from its user-level trust file.
